input: which player has won the most scoring titles
output: SELECT p.player_name, COUNT(*) AS scoring_titles FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.pts = (SELECT MAX(ps2.pts) FROM player_season ps2 WHERE ps2.season_id = ps.season_id) GROUP BY p.player_name ORDER BY scoring_titles DESC LIMIT 1;

input: who has the most seasons leading the league in rebounds
output: SELECT p.player_name, COUNT(*) AS reb_titles FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.reb = (SELECT MAX(ps2.reb) FROM player_season ps2 WHERE ps2.season_id = ps.season_id) GROUP BY p.player_name ORDER BY reb_titles DESC LIMIT 1;

input: list players who have over 15000 career points and also averaged over 7 rebounds per game for their career
output: SELECT p.player_name, SUM(pg.pts) AS career_pts, AVG(ps.reb) AS avg_reb FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING SUM(pg.pts) > 15000 AND AVG(ps.reb) > 7 ORDER BY career_pts DESC;

input: who were the elite big men scoring and rebounding in their careers
output: SELECT p.player_name, SUM(pg.pts) AS career_pts, AVG(ps.reb) AS avg_reb FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING SUM(pg.pts) > 15000 AND AVG(ps.reb) > 7 ORDER BY career_pts DESC LIMIT 10;

input: players who won more than 50 games in a season in 2017
output: SELECT p.player_name, pg.w FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE pg.season_id = 22016 AND pg.w > 50 ORDER BY pg.w DESC;

input: which players were on winning teams in 2017 50 plus wins
output: SELECT p.player_name, pg.w FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE pg.season_id = 22016 AND pg.w > 50 ORDER BY pg.w DESC LIMIT 10;

input: all star caliber players in 2020 scoring 20 plus with positive net rating
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps.pts, ps.net_rating FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.season_id = 22019 AND ps.pts >= 20 AND ps.net_rating > 0 ORDER BY ps.pts DESC;

input: who deserved an all star nod in 2020 by the numbers
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps.pts, ps.reb, ps.ast, ps.net_rating FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.season_id = 22019 AND ps.pts >= 20 AND ps.net_rating > 0 ORDER BY ps.pts DESC LIMIT 12;

input: who led each team in scoring in 2022
output: SELECT t.nickname, p.player_name, ps.pts FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id JOIN team t ON ps.team_id = t.team_id WHERE ps.season_id = 22021 AND ps.pts = (SELECT MAX(ps2.pts) FROM player_season ps2 WHERE ps2.team_id = ps.team_id AND ps2.season_id = ps.season_id) ORDER BY ps.pts DESC;

input: best scorer on each team in 2022
output: SELECT t.nickname, p.player_name, ps.pts FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id JOIN team t ON ps.team_id = t.team_id WHERE ps.season_id = 22021 AND ps.pts = (SELECT MAX(ps2.pts) FROM player_season ps2 WHERE ps2.team_id = ps.team_id AND ps2.season_id = ps.season_id) ORDER BY ps.pts DESC;

input: was lebron or kobe ever on the same team
output: SELECT COUNT(*) AS shared_seasons FROM player_general_traditional_total pg1 JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg2 ON pg1.team_id = pg2.team_id AND pg1.season_id = pg2.season_id JOIN player p1 ON pg1.player_id = p1.player_id JOIN player p2 ON pg2.player_id = p2.player_id WHERE p1.player_name = 'LeBron James' AND p2.player_name = 'Kobe Bryant';

input: did kobe and shaq ever play together
output: SELECT pg1.season_id, t.city, t.nickname FROM player_general_traditional_total pg1 JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg2 ON pg1.team_id = pg2.team_id AND pg1.season_id = pg2.season_id JOIN player p1 ON pg1.player_id = p1.player_id JOIN player p2 ON pg2.player_id = p2.player_id JOIN team t ON pg1.team_id = t.team_id WHERE p1.player_name = 'Kobe Bryant' AND p2.player_name = 'Shaquille O''Neal' ORDER BY pg1.season_id;

input: players who improved their three point percentage by most from 2015 to 2016
output: SELECT p.player_name, pg16.fg3_pct - pg15.fg3_pct AS improvement FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg15 ON p.player_id = pg15.player_id AND pg15.season_id = 22014 JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg16 ON p.player_id = pg16.player_id AND pg16.season_id = 22015 WHERE pg15.fg3a >= 50 AND pg16.fg3a >= 50 ORDER BY improvement DESC LIMIT 5;

input: who got way better from three from 2015 to 2016
output: SELECT p.player_name, pg16.fg3_pct - pg15.fg3_pct AS three_pct_jump FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg15 ON p.player_id = pg15.player_id AND pg15.season_id = 22014 JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg16 ON p.player_id = pg16.player_id AND pg16.season_id = 22015 WHERE pg15.fg3a >= 50 AND pg16.fg3a >= 50 ORDER BY three_pct_jump DESC LIMIT 5;

input: how many total three pointers were made in the nba in 2019

input: how many threes did the whole league jack up in 2019

input: which players have played in every decade from the 90s to the 2020s
output: SELECT p.player_name FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING MAX(pg.season_id) >= 22019 AND MIN(pg.season_id) <= 21999;

input: players who improved their net rating the most from one season to the next min 40 games both seasons
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps2.season_id, ps2.net_rating - ps1.net_rating AS improvement FROM player p JOIN player_season ps1 ON p.player_id = ps1.player_id JOIN player_season ps2 ON p.player_id = ps2.player_id AND ps2.season_id = ps1.season_id + 1 WHERE ps1.gp >= 40 AND ps2.gp >= 40 ORDER BY improvement DESC LIMIT 10;

input: players who had the biggest drop in net rating from one season to the next min 40 games both seasons
output: SELECT p.player_name, ps2.season_id, ps1.net_rating - ps2.net_rating AS net_rating_drop FROM player p JOIN player_season ps1 ON p.player_id = ps1.player_id JOIN player_season ps2 ON p.player_id = ps2.player_id AND ps2.season_id = ps1.season_id + 1 WHERE ps1.gp >= 40 AND ps2.gp >= 40 ORDER BY net_rating_drop DESC LIMIT 10;

input: players who improved their three point percentage the most from one season to the next min 100 attempts both
output: SELECT p.player_name, pg2.season_id, pg2.fg3_pct - pg1.fg3_pct AS improvement FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg1 ON p.player_id = pg1.player_id JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg2 ON p.player_id = pg2.player_id AND pg2.season_id = pg1.season_id + 1 WHERE pg1.fg3a >= 100 AND pg2.fg3a >= 100 ORDER BY improvement DESC LIMIT 10;

input: players who had more wins than losses in every season of their career min 8 seasons 50 games each
output: SELECT p.player_name, COUNT(*) AS seasons FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE pg.gp >= 50 GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING MIN(pg.w_pct) > 0.5 AND COUNT(*) >= 8 ORDER BY seasons DESC;

input: players who were on a winning team in 2015 and still in the league in 2022 min 50 games both seasons
output: SELECT p.player_name FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg15 ON p.player_id = pg15.player_id AND pg15.season_id = 22014 JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg22 ON p.player_id = pg22.player_id AND pg22.season_id = 22021 WHERE pg15.w_pct >= 0.5 AND pg15.gp >= 50 AND pg22.gp >= 50 ORDER BY p.player_name;

input: players who went from a losing team to a winning team from 2019 to 2020 min 50 games each
output: SELECT p.player_name, pg19.w_pct AS old_win_pct, pg20.w_pct AS new_win_pct FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg19 ON p.player_id = pg19.player_id AND pg19.season_id = 22018 JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg20 ON p.player_id = pg20.player_id AND pg20.season_id = 22019 WHERE pg19.w_pct < 0.5 AND pg20.w_pct >= 0.5 AND pg19.gp >= 50 AND pg20.gp >= 50 AND pg19.team_id != pg20.team_id ORDER BY pg20.w_pct DESC;

input: players who played in the 2000s and averaged over 25 ppg in at least one season min 50 games
output: SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name, ps.pts, ps.season_id FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.season_id BETWEEN 21999 AND 22009 AND ps.pts >= 25 AND ps.gp >= 50 ORDER BY ps.pts DESC;

input: players who played in the 2010s and averaged over 30 ppg in at least one season min 50 games
output: SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name, ps.pts, ps.season_id FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.season_id BETWEEN 22009 AND 22019 AND ps.pts >= 30 AND ps.gp >= 50 ORDER BY ps.pts DESC;

input: players who scored over 20 ppg in the 90s and still scored over 15 ppg in the 2000s min 50 games each
output: SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name FROM player p JOIN player_season ps90 ON p.player_id = ps90.player_id JOIN player_season ps00 ON p.player_id = ps00.player_id WHERE ps90.season_id BETWEEN 21989 AND 21999 AND ps00.season_id BETWEEN 21999 AND 22009 AND ps90.pts >= 20 AND ps00.pts >= 15 AND ps90.gp >= 50 AND ps00.gp >= 50;

input: which college produced the most players who averaged over 15 ppg in a season min 50 games
output: SELECT p.college, COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_id) AS num_players FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.pts >= 15 AND ps.gp >= 50 AND p.college IS NOT NULL AND p.college != '' GROUP BY p.college ORDER BY num_players DESC LIMIT 10;

input: average career scoring by college attended min 5 players from that college 200 games each
output: SELECT p.college, AVG(career_stats.avg_pts) AS college_avg_pts FROM player p JOIN (SELECT player_id, AVG(pts) AS avg_pts FROM player_season GROUP BY player_id HAVING SUM(gp) >= 200) career_stats ON p.player_id = career_stats.player_id WHERE p.college IS NOT NULL AND p.college != '' GROUP BY p.college HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY college_avg_pts DESC LIMIT 10;

input: which draft class has the most total career points summed across all players
output: SELECT p.draft_year, SUM(pg.pts) AS total_pts FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE p.draft_year != 'Undrafted' GROUP BY p.draft_year ORDER BY total_pts DESC LIMIT 5;

input: which draft class has the highest average career scoring min 10 players from that class min 200 games each
output: SELECT p.draft_year, AVG(career.avg_pts) AS class_avg_pts FROM player p JOIN (SELECT player_id, AVG(pts) AS avg_pts FROM player_season GROUP BY player_id HAVING SUM(gp) >= 200) career ON p.player_id = career.player_id WHERE p.draft_year != 'Undrafted' GROUP BY p.draft_year HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10 ORDER BY class_avg_pts DESC LIMIT 5;

input: players who were drafted in the first round and played fewer than 100 total career games
output: SELECT p.player_name, p.draft_year, p.draft_number, SUM(pg.gp) AS career_gp FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE p.draft_round = '1' GROUP BY p.player_name, p.draft_year, p.draft_number HAVING SUM(pg.gp) < 100 ORDER BY CAST(p.draft_number AS INTEGER);

input: biggest busts first round picks with fewest career games played min top 5 overall pick
output: SELECT p.player_name, p.draft_year, p.draft_number, SUM(pg.gp) AS career_gp FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE p.draft_round = '1' AND CAST(p.draft_number AS INTEGER) <= 5 GROUP BY p.player_name, p.draft_year, p.draft_number ORDER BY career_gp ASC LIMIT 10;

input: players who were drafted in the top 3 but averaged under 10 ppg for their career min 200 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, p.draft_year, p.draft_number, AVG(ps.pts) AS avg_pts FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE CAST(p.draft_number AS INTEGER) <= 3 AND p.draft_round = '1' GROUP BY p.player_name, p.draft_year, p.draft_number HAVING SUM(ps.gp) >= 200 AND AVG(ps.pts) < 10 ORDER BY avg_pts ASC;

input: players who have had the most seasons appearing in the top 10 in scoring min 50 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, COUNT(*) AS top10_seasons FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.gp >= 50 AND ps.pts >= (SELECT MIN(pts) FROM (SELECT pts FROM player_season WHERE season_id = ps.season_id AND gp >= 50 ORDER BY pts DESC LIMIT 10)) GROUP BY p.player_name ORDER BY top10_seasons DESC LIMIT 10;

input: which player has been in the top 5 in assists the most seasons min 50 games
output: SELECT p.player_name, COUNT(*) AS top5_ast_seasons FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.gp >= 50 AND ps.ast >= (SELECT MIN(ast) FROM (SELECT ast FROM player_season WHERE season_id = ps.season_id AND gp >= 50 ORDER BY ast DESC LIMIT 5)) GROUP BY p.player_name ORDER BY top5_ast_seasons DESC LIMIT 5;

input: players who are in the top 10 all time in both points and assists career totals
output: SELECT p.player_name, SUM(pg.pts) AS career_pts, SUM(pg.ast) AS career_ast FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING SUM(pg.pts) >= (SELECT MIN(pts_total) FROM (SELECT SUM(pts) AS pts_total FROM player_general_traditional_total GROUP BY player_id ORDER BY pts_total DESC LIMIT 10)) AND SUM(pg.ast) >= (SELECT MIN(ast_total) FROM (SELECT SUM(ast) AS ast_total FROM player_general_traditional_total GROUP BY player_id ORDER BY ast_total DESC LIMIT 10)) ORDER BY career_pts DESC;

input: players who are in the top 10 all time in both points and rebounds career totals
output: SELECT p.player_name, SUM(pg.pts) AS career_pts, SUM(pg.reb) AS career_reb FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING SUM(pg.pts) >= (SELECT MIN(pts_total) FROM (SELECT SUM(pts) AS pts_total FROM player_general_traditional_total GROUP BY player_id ORDER BY pts_total DESC LIMIT 10)) AND SUM(pg.reb) >= (SELECT MIN(reb_total) FROM (SELECT SUM(reb) AS reb_total FROM player_general_traditional_total GROUP BY player_id ORDER BY reb_total DESC LIMIT 10)) ORDER BY career_pts DESC;

input: players with over 100 triple doubles in their career
output: SELECT p.player_name, SUM(pg.td3) AS career_td3 FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING SUM(pg.td3) >= 100 ORDER BY career_td3 DESC;
